# Inkwell — Forkable Astro CMS

> A config-driven content system with Markdown publishing, static output, search, and optional Worker integrations.

## Identity

Inkwell Project is building a forkable CMS for agent-first publishing. It focuses on Markdown content, configurable themes, search, RSS, structured data, and optional API/Worker integrations.

## Key Numbers

- Reference implementation with content collections, layouts, and publishing workflows
- Optional Worker/API integrations for reactions, newsletter, and publishing
- Pagefind static search and structured metadata
- Example content covering blogs, labs, topics, tools, and team pages

## Products & Offerings

### For Publishers
Write content in Markdown, publish through files or APIs, and keep the CMS simple to fork.

### For Builders
Inkwell is designed to be extended with your own workflows, workers, and integrations.

## Sitemap

### Topics (Living Knowledge Hubs)
- /topics — Index of all tracked topics
- /topics/agentic-economy — The rise of autonomous AI agents as economic actors
- /topics/ai-developer-tools — CMS tooling, MCP, search, and the modern publishing stack

### Labs (What We Build)
- /labs — All projects and experiments
- /labs/sos — Optional system integration examples
- /labs/inkwell — AI-first CMS on Astro + Cloudflare
- /labs/mumcp — WordPress MCP tools
- /labs/torivers — AI automation marketplace
- /labs/trop — Example content brand

### Tools (Ready to Use)
- /tools — Skills, plugins, MCP servers
- /tools/inkwell-publish — Publishing skill for AI agents
- /tools/sos-mcp — Example MCP bus integration

- /team/kay — Founder

- /products — Available offerings
- /products/sitepilotai — AI-powered WordPress management

### Pages
- /vision — Seven objectives for the CMS
- /about — Origin story, reference implementation
- /blog — Experience feed and build journals
- /explore — Knowledge graph visualization
- /privacy — Privacy policy
- /terms — Terms of service

## Technical

- Framework: Astro 6 (static site generation)
- Hosting: Cloudflare Pages
- Search: Pagefind (static index)
- API: Cloudflare Workers (Hono)
- Storage: Cloudflare D1, R2, KV
- Agent Bus: SOS MCP (SSE on port 6070)
- Memory: Optional external memory layer

## Open Source

- Inkwell: https://github.com/your-org/inkwell
